text:

ea]." National Development and Reform Commission et al. 28 August 2017. Online:
http://www.ndrc.gov.cn/zcfb/zcfbtz/201708/t20170830_859400.html

shi lianhe chengjie de hezuo beiwanglu [Memorandum of Understanding on Cooperation concerning

vant Persons in the Transportation and Logistics Sector]." National Development and Reform Com-
mission. 24 August 2017. Online:
http://www.ndrc.gov.cn/zcfb/zcfbtz/201709/t20170906_860217.html

beiwanglu [Memorandum of Understanding on Coorperation concerning Implementing Joint Pun-
ishment Against Law-breaking and Untrustworthy Subjects in the Oil and Natural Gas Sector]." Na-
tional Development and Reform Commission. 2 August 2017.
